name: Brazil
style_of_play: Fluid attacking football with emphasis on dribbling, width, and quick interchanges in the final third.
weaknesses: can leave space behind the fullbacks
tactical_summary: Attack with width through overlapping fullbacks and inverted wingers; central midfielders link play and arrive late in the box. Press aggressively after turnovers to force mistakes high up the pitch.
why_it_matters: Brazil's ability to isolate defenders in wide areas creates constant crossing and cut-back opportunities against narrow defensive shapes.
injury_news: Placeholder — no live injury feed connected yet.
